concat.scalar:
Let me tell you about the crown jewel of our 2026 World Cup collection. The Limited Edition Jersey is not just a piece of clothing, it is a piece of history.

2026 Limited Edition Jersey — $149.99 USD

What makes it unlike anything else on the market:


  - Laser-engraved match dates from Argentina's iconic road to the 2022 World Cup title
  -

Embedded QR code that unlocks exclusive digital content including 3D celebration videos
  - Anti-counterfeit holographic seal certifying it is 100% official
  - Unique serial number — no two jerseys are the same
  - Delivered in a premium collector's box
  - Sold exclusively through this store, not available on Adidas.

com or any third party retailer

Only 500 units exist worldwide and we are already 60% sold. Once they are gone, they are gone for good.
[Watch the unboxing video](https://store.scaloneta.com/unboxing2026)
[View full product details and photos](https://store.scaloneta.com/limited-edition-2026)

Great question. Here is an honest side by side so you can decide what is right for you.

Standard Home or Away Jersey — $89.99 USD


  - Official AFA licensed fabric and badge
  - AeroComfort moisture-wicking technology
  - Available in all sizes
  - Restocked regularly throughout the season

2026 Limited Edition Jersey — $149.99 USD


  - Everything the standard jersey has, plus:
  -

Collector laser engraving and unique serial number
  - QR code with exclusive legacy digital content
  - Holographic authenticity seal
  - Only 500 units, never restocked once sold out
  - Exclusive to this store, not sold anywhere else

If you want a jersey to wear to every match, the standard is perfect. If you want something you will still be showing off in 20 years,

the Limited Edition is the one.
[See the full comparison ](https://store.scaloneta.com/compare)

  - 2XL — chest 42 to 44 inches
